id.description: UUID v4. Identifies the puzzle definition. Assigned at creation, stable forever. Used by libraries to deduplicate and associate saved progress with the correct puzzle.

type.description: embedded = file inside zip. external = src is a URL.

checksum.description: SHA-256 checksum of the source image bytes. Format: 'sha256:' followed by exactly 64 lowercase hex characters. Computed over raw file bytes prior to any container encoding. SHA-256 is the only supported algorithm in v0.1.

pieceCount.description: Hint only. Not authoritative. pieces.json is the source of truth.

checksum.description: SHA-256 checksum of the pieces.json file bytes prior to any container encoding.

solved.description: Canonical solved positions. Immutable. Part of puzzle definition.

checksum.description: SHA-256 checksum of the solved.json file bytes prior to any container encoding.

state.description: Optional. A .jigg without state is a valid shareable puzzle.
